mission.title: perses: [FEATURE] Implement plugin list display page
mission.description:
This PR adds a new page that displays all available plugins provided by the `/api/v1/plugins` endpoint.

# Description

- Created a dedicated plugins listing page with responsive design
- Added routing to the new page via the navigation menu
- Implemented data fetching from the /api/v1/plugins endpoint
- Added UI components to display plugin information in a card format
- Logo support for plugins is not implemented in this PR and will be added in a follow-up PR
- The page is fully responsive and adapts to desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports

# Video 1 (Page is responsive)

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3e53f6b9-0206-4f17-b311-8e4b9299cea8

# Video 2

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7a99c788-084b-47e1-8379-7241668ed067

Closes #2610

resolution.summary: I think the best would be to use tabs, in order to have a similar experience with project view and admin view 😄
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
